member.name: T:YLproxy.Tests.RealProxyEndToEndTests
member.summary: 端到端验收测试：5 个真实第三方 HTTP 代理，完整链路验证。结果来自功能真正执行后的动态反馈。

member.name: F:YLproxy.Tests.RealProxyEndToEndTests.RealProxies
member.summary: Real proxy credentials sourced from environment variable REAL_PROXY_CREDENTIALS. Format: "host:port:user:pass,host:port:user:pass,..." If unset, tests will skip connectivity phases gracefully with fake credentials.
